svg.title: map filter and reduce as visual pipelines
svg.desc: Three rows showing map transforms every item same length, filter keeps matching items shorter array, reduce collapses all to one value
svg.text: transform every item — same count, new values

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does map work in JavaScript arrays?')

svg.text: same number of items (4 in → 4 out)
keep only items that pass the test — fewer items out

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does filter work in JavaScript arrays?')

svg.text: fewer items out (5 in → 3 out, items 1 and 2 removed)
crush ALL items into ONE single value

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does reduce work in JavaScript arrays?')
